title: Delicate Algerian Dates Gelatin Pudding
description: A resinous and crumbly dish featuring gelatine leafs slow-cooked with dates for a jain-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups of chopped nuts (walnuts or almonds)
1/4 cup of honey or jaggery for flavoring

instructions: Place gelatin leafs in a small pot, cover with water and heat until the gelatin dissolves.
Add dates to the dissolved gelatin, simmer for about 10 minutes.
Stir in chopped nuts and honey/jaggery, continue cooking until mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly before serving.
